# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.
# Category: container_security

# Use multi-stage builds
FROM php:7.2-apache as web_server
COPY ./webapp /var/www/html/
EXPOSE 80

FROM node:12 as api_server
WORKDIR /api
COPY ./api /api
RUN npm install
CMD ["npm", "start"]
EXPOSE 8080

FROM postgres:11 as db_server
COPY ./database /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/
EXPOSE 5432

FROM redis:latest as redis_server
EXPOSE 6379

# Final stage
FROM alpine:latest
RUN apk add --no-cache nginx socat

COPY --from=web_server /var/www/html/ /var/www/nginx/html/
COPY --from=api_server /api /api
COPY --from=db_server /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/ /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/
COPY --from=redis_server /data /data

COPY nginx.conf /etc/nginx/nginx.conf

CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]

EXPOSE 80 8080 5432 6379
